MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Feb-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Previn A. Wick of POND NORTH LLP (213-617-6170), appearing for defendant / moving party Fraser's Boiler Services, Inc.
Kimberly Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties Scott Glabb, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT FRASER'S BOILER SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Fraser's Boiler Service, Inc.'s motion for summary adjudication is denied as to issue 1 (negligence and premises owner/contractor liability) and off calendar as to issues 2 and 3 (products liability and punitive damages). Assuming without deciding that defendant properly showed that it was not in control of any of the shipyards at issue, defendant failed to sustain its burden of demonstrating that such lack of control is fatal to plaintiff's claims for negligence and premises owner/contractor liability. Plaintiff dismissed his products liability causes of action and claim for punitive damages. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Tara A. Lohman of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #13428 (Tel: 510-451-1580) (503/TLJ)

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2013 Set For Trial On Mar-17-14 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 503
